an3.113:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, there are three who, if they do not abandon thisfault of theirs, are bound for the plane of misery, bound for hell. Which three?(1) One who, though not celibate, claims to be celibate; (2) one who slanders a pure celibate leading a pure celibate life with a groundless charge of non-celibacy; and (3) one who holds such a doctrine and view as this: ‘There is no fault in sensual pleasures,’ and then falls into indulgence in sensual pleasures.These are the three who, if they do not abandon thisfault of theirs, are bound for the plane of misery, bound for hell."
